name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — how did we do?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We know the dentist isn't everyone's favorite place to be, and it genuinely means a lot that you trusted us with your care.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd really appreciate a quick review — honest feedback helps other folks who are nervous about finding a dental clinic know what to expect:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something wasn't quite right during your visit, please just hit reply and let us know directly — we'd rather hear it from you first so we can make it right.

Thanks again, and take care of those smiles.

— The Bright Smile Dental team

Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick follow-up: if you have 30 seconds, we'd love a short review. It really helps other patients find us: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. Thanks!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
